case_title: SIMPSON, ALLEN R. vs. MARTIN, KELLY T. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ALLEN R. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, KELLY T.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ALLEN R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, KELLY T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 412 BRODERICK ST, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ALLEN R. SERVED AUG-17-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, KELLY T.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $25.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ALLEN R.
WRITTEN AUTHORIZATION FROM OWNER FOR APPEARANCE ON THEIR BEHALF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPSON, ALLEN R.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, KELLY T.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, KELLY T.
